title: Returning customer applies a coupon
intent: Prove that a valid coupon changes the cart total and persists after reopening the cart.
risk: Customers may be charged the undiscounted amount.
preconditions: The cart contains one in-stock product
outcomes: The coupon is shown as applied
The displayed total includes the discount
The discounted total persists after reopening the cart
negativeCases: Expired coupon is rejected without changing the total
Coupon API failure leaves the original total and shows a recoverable error

notes: Create the cart through the project's API fixture

cleanup: Delete the test cart through the API fixture
